summary: Iteration 235: Complete testing of Global Micro-Interaction System, Welcome Notification on First Login, and AppLauncher + AppLoader. All features working correctly. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All portals (Admin, Customer, Partner, Sales Manager, Finance Manager) load correctly with micro-interactions and welcome notifications.

tests: AppLauncher shows on first session load
sessionStorage key 'konekt_launcher_shown' set to '1' after animation
Login page renders normally after launcher completes
AppLoader component used in AdminDashboardV2 loading states
AppLoader used in SalesManagerDashboard loading state
AppLoader used in FinanceManagerDashboard loading state
AppLoader used in report pages (Business Health, Sales, Financial, Inventory, Weekly, Alerts)
AppLoader used in ProfileSettingsPage

Welcome notification has CTA 'Open Dashboard' linking to /admin
Notification visible in bell dropdown
Duplicate login does NOT create duplicate notification (idempotent)

Welcome notification has CTA 'Open Dashboard' linking to /account

Welcome notification has CTA linking to /admin

micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-btn-press: Applied to Button component base class - provides scale(0.97) on active
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-card-interactive: Applied to Card with interactive prop and MetricCard - provides hover lift
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-page-fade-in: Applied to Outlet wrapper in all layouts - provides fade-slide-up animation
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-tab-fade: Applied to TabsContent - provides fade animation on tab switch
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-backdrop-fade: Applied to StandardDrawerShell backdrop - provides fade-in animation
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-drawer-panel: Applied to StandardDrawerShell panel - provides slide-in-right animation
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-spinner: Available for Button loading state - provides rotating spinner

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 235 verified: (1) Global Micro-Interaction System - all k- prefixed CSS classes working (k-btn-press, k-card-interactive, k-page-fade-in, k-tab-fade, k-backdrop-fade, k-drawer-panel). (2) Welcome Notification on First Login - one-time, role-aware notifications created via _create_welcome_notification function in server.py, uses recipient_user_id field for querying. (3) AppLauncher shows on first session (sessionStorage key 'konekt_launcher_shown'), AppLoader replaces generic spinners in dashboards and reports. All 4 portals (Admin, Customer, Partner, Staff) working correctly. No console errors or visual regressions.
